title: jc start-right and commit skill remediation claim
body: Opened claim 91cbc152-4cd5-40f7-9271-1ba7f3f55e65 after claims list returned no active claims. Scope is limited to canonical and generated-adapter documentation for jc-start-right-quick, jc-start-right-thorough, and jc-commit, plus directly required shared-state capture. I will avoid repo-continuity and pending-graduations edits unless a live coordination update requires them.
